summary: Bounded deterministic proof for the frozen embedded Sigil fixture.

entries.contract: The embedded Sigil snapshot remains digest-sealed, schema-valid, non-discoverable, absent from recipes and packaging, and owned by the external product repository.
entries.worth: This is the only AOS-owned proof for embedded Sigil bytes; it prevents accidental product authority or launch compatibility from returning without treating product behavior as AOS acceptance.
replaces: embedded Sigil renderer, status-item, real-input, and product behavior proofs
entries.guard: static files and Node scripts only; no AOS binary, daemon, canvas, native input, or TCC

entries.contract: AOS retires only the historical Sigil content root that resolves to the frozen apps/sigil fixture and preserves every external or user-defined content root.
entries.worth: This prevents the frozen product fixture from remaining servable after authority moved to the external Sigil repository without broad or heuristic config deletion.
replaces: manual removal of the stale embedded Sigil content root
entries.guard: disposable pure Swift helper compile only; no AOS binary, daemon, config mutation, fixture mutation, GUI, or TCC
